definitions: A funnel-shaped cavity or structure in the body.
The stalk connecting the pituitary gland to the hypothalamus.
The funnel-shaped opening of the fallopian tube.
The funnel-shaped upper part of the renal pelvis.
examples: The infundibulum of the pituitary gland is crucial.
Surgeons examined the infundibulum for abnormalities.
Each infundibulum plays a specific role.
